title: AbyssTotem
description: AbyssTotem - saves you from the void and teleports you to safety.
body:
# 🌑 AbyssTotem

> _Fall into the void. Come back._

***

## ✨ What does it do?

The **Abyss Totem** saves you from dying in the void.

When you fall into the void holding the Abyss Totem:

*   🌀 **Teleports you** to the nearest safe block within 64 blocks
*   🪨 **No island nearby?** Spawns an obsidian platform so you always survive
*   💜 **Grants effects** — Regeneration, Resistance, Fire Resistance & Slow Falling
*   ✨ **Visual feedback** — soul & portal particles with a totem sound on activation
*   ❤️ **Works like a vanilla totem too** — saves you from any death, not just the void

***

## 🔨 Crafting Recipe

*   2x **Ender Pearl**
*   3x **Blaze Rod**
*   3x **Obsidian**
*   1x **Totem of Undying**

![Crafting Recipe](https://i.imgur.com/ZaQ55i0.png) 

***

## 📦 Where to find it?

The Abyss Totem can be found in **End City chests** with a 30% chance.

***
